name: Robb LeMasters
background: Mr. LeMasters has served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2021. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Strategy and Corporate Development from 2020 to 2021 and was a member of the Board of Directors from 2015 to 2020.

companies.name: BWX Technologies, Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
